zh.Granhammar, Västra Ryd, Uppsala, Schwede: 瑞典烏普薩拉維亞斯特拉 雷德格藍納馬爾
zh.Granhammar, Västra Ryd, Uppsala, Sweden: 瑞典烏普薩拉維亞斯特拉 雷德格藍納馬爾
zh.Granhammar, Västra Ryd, Uppsala, Sverige: 瑞典烏普薩拉維亞斯特拉 雷德格藍納馬爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Peder Eriksson Örnflycht於1448年出生在瑞典烏普薩拉維亞斯特拉 雷德格藍納馬爾時，他的父親Erik Gregersson Örnflycht34歲，母親Mrs. Erik Gregersson Örnflycht45歲。他於1477年與Karin Arendtsdotter在瑞典烏普薩拉維亞斯特拉 雷德格藍納馬爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1497年在瑞典烏普薩拉維亞斯特拉 雷德格藍納馬爾享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Peder Eriksson Örnflycht于1448年出生在瑞典烏普薩拉維亞斯特拉 雷德格藍納馬爾时，他的父亲Erik Gregersson Örnflycht34岁，母亲Mrs. Erik Gregersson Örnflycht45岁。他于1477年与Karin Arendtsdotter在瑞典烏普薩拉維亞斯特拉 雷德格藍納馬爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1497年在瑞典烏普薩拉維亞斯特拉 雷德格藍納馬爾享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: Peder
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: Eriksson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Lars, Anders, Nils, Per, Alf, Algot, Alvar, Bjorn, Elof, Knut, Mats.
Swedish: patronymic from the personal name Erik, from Old Norse Eiríkr (see Erickson ). Compare Erickson , Ericsson , and Erikson .

variants.name: Erikson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Anders, Nils, Astrid, Berndt, Iver, Karsten, Lars, Lennart, Lief, Thor.  German Gerhart, Ernst.

Americanized form (and a rare Swedish variant) of Swedish   Eriksson  . This is also an Americanized form of the Norwegian, Danish, and North German cognate   Eriksen  . Compare   Erekson   and   Erickson  .

variants.name: Erickson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Nels, Thor, Nils, Lars, Sven, Lief, Anders, Lennart, Iver, Elof, Erland.

Americanized form (and a rare Swedish variant) of Swedish Ericsson and Eriksson , Norwegian, Danish, and North German Eriksen and Erichsen , or of any other Scandinavian or North German patronymic from a personal name derived from Old Norse Eiríkr, which is composed of ei ‘ever, always’ (or a shortened form of ein ‘one, only’) + rík ‘power’. Compare Ericksen , Ericson , and Erikson .
English (Lancashire): patronymic from the Middle English male personal name Eric (with the same etymology as 1 above) + son.

variants.name: Erekson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Thor.
Americanized form of Swedish Eriksson or of any other Scandinavian patronymic from a personal name derived from Old Norse Eiríkr (see Erickson ).

variants.name: Ericsson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Lars, Sven, Anders, Britt, Gunvor, Johan, Kerstin, Tor.
Swedish: variant of   Eriksson  . Compare   Erickson   and   Ericson  .

historicEvents.title: The Russo-Swedish War
historicEvents.description: While in an alliance with Grand Prince Ivan III of Moscow, King Hans of Denmark and Norway invaded Sweden and was declared King of Sweden.

en.lifeSummary: When Peder Eriksson Örnflycht was born in 1448, in Granhammar, Västra Ryd, Uppsala, Sweden, his father, Erik Gregersson Örnflycht, was 34 and his mother, Mrs. Erik Gregersson Örnflycht, was 45. He married Karin Arendtsdotter in 1477, in Granhammar, Västra Ryd, Uppsala, Sweden. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1497, in Granhammar, Västra Ryd, Uppsala, Sweden, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Peder Eriksson Örnflycht est né en 1448, à Granhammar, Västra Ryd, Uppsala, Suède, son père, Erik Gregersson Örnflycht, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Erik Gregersson Örnflycht, avait 45 ans. Il a épousé Karin Arendtsdotter en 1477, à Granhammar, Västra Ryd, Uppsala, Suède. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1497, à Granhammar, Västra Ryd, Uppsala, Suède, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Peder Eriksson Örnflycht 1448 in Granhammar, Västra Ryd, Uppsala, Schweden geboren wurde, war sein Vater Erik Gregersson Örnflycht 34 und seine Mutter Mrs. Erik Gregersson Örnflycht 45. Er hat 1477 in Granhammar, Västra Ryd, Uppsala, Schweden Karin Arendtsdotter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1497 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Granhammar, Västra Ryd, Uppsala, Schweden.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Peder Eriksson Örnflycht è nato il nel 1448 nel Granhammar, Västra Ryd, Uppsala, Svezia, il suo padre, Erik Gregersson Örnflycht, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Erik Gregersson Örnflycht, aveva 45 anni. Lui sposato Karin Arendtsdotter nel 1477, nel Granhammar, Västra Ryd, Uppsala, Svezia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1497, nel Granhammar, Västra Ryd, Uppsala, Svezia, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Peder Eriksson Örnflychtが1448年にスウェーデンウップサラvaストラ リドグランハンマーで生まれた時，父Erik Gregersson Örnflychtは34歳，母Mrs. Erik Gregersson Örnflychtは45歳であった。1477年にスウェーデンウップサラvaストラ リドグランハンマーでKarin Arendtsdotterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1497年にスウェーデンウップサラvaストラ リドグランハンマーで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Peder Eriksson Örnflycht(이)가 1448년 스웨덴 업프사라 브a스트라 리드 그랜해마에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Erik Gregersson Örnflycht(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Erik Gregersson Örnflycht(은)는 45세였다. 그는 1477년 스웨덴 업프사라 브a스트라 리드 그랜해마에서 Karin Arendtsdotter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1497년 스웨덴 업프사라 브a스트라 리드 그랜해마에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Peder Eriksson Örnflycht nasceu em 1448, em Granhammar, Västra Ryd, Uppsala, Suécia, seu pai, Erik Gregersson Örnflycht, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Erik Gregersson Örnflycht, tinha 45 anos. Ele casou-se com Karin Arendtsdotter em 1477, em Granhammar, Västra Ryd, Uppsala, Suécia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1497, em Granhammar, Västra Ryd, Uppsala, Suécia, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Peder Eriksson Örnflycht родился в 1448 г. в местности гранаммар, вaстра рид, уппсала, Швеция, его отцу по имени Erik Gregersson Örnflycht было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Erik Gregersson Örnflycht, 45. Он женился на женщине по имени Karin Arendtsdotter в 1477 г. в местности гранаммар, вaстра рид, уппсала, Швеция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1497 г. в местности гранаммар, вaстра рид, уппсала, Швеция в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Peder Eriksson Örnflycht nació en 1448, en Granhammar, Västra Ryd, Uppsala, Suecia, su papá, Erik Gregersson Örnflycht, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Mrs. Erik Gregersson Örnflycht, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Karin Arendtsdotter en 1477, en Granhammar, Västra Ryd, Uppsala, Suecia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1497, en Granhammar, Västra Ryd, Uppsala, Suecia, a la edad de 49 años.
